channel.title: Teaching Resources on MathTR
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching Resources on MathTR

item.title: Course Slides
item.description: Slides for MA336 Topic 1: Statistical Studies Topic 2: Summarizing Data Graphically Topic 3: Summarizing Data Numerically Topic 4: Linear Relationship Topic 5: Introduction to Probability Topic 6: Two-way Tables Topic 7: Discrete Random Variables Topic 8: Continuous Random Variables Topic 9: Sampling Distribution Topic 10: Confidence Interval for a Mean Topic 11: Confidence Interval for a Proportion Topic 12: Concepts of Hypothesis Testing Topic 13: Hypothesis Testing for a Mean or a Proportion Slides for MA321 Lesson 1: Fundamentals of Statistics Lesson 2: Statistical Study - Trust or Not Lesson 3: Statistical Tables and Graph Lesson 4: Graphics in the Media Lesson 5: Correlation and Causality Lesson 6: Characterizing Data Lesson 7: Measures of Variation Lesson 8: The Normal Distribution Lesson 9: Statistical Inference Lesson 10: Understand, Solve, and Explain Lesson 11: Problem-Solving with Units Lesson 12: Problem-Solving Guidelines and Hints Lesson 13: Mathematics and Music Lesson 14: Perspective and Symmetry Lesson 15: Proportion and the Golden Ratio Lesson 16: Functions - The Building Blocks of Mathematical Models Lesson 17: Linear Modeling

item.title: Excel Labs for MA321
item.description: List of lab instructions Lab 1: Introduction Lab 2: Frequency Tables Lab 3: Scatterplot Lab 4: Descriptive Statistics Lab 5: Normal Distribution Lab 6: Unit Conversion Lab 7: Exponetiation Lab 8: Functions

item.title: Resources for Teachers
item.description: Presentations on Tools for Teachers How to Self-Publish a Book Online Using Bookdown Rmarkdown and Other Productivity Tools for Math Teachers Exam Policies with Timer Exam Policies with Real Time Clock and Timer

item.title: Slides for MA321 Mathematics in Contemporary Society
